ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Courgette or zucchini, flesh and skin, raw
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text:
Brocolis 15.9% mini, choux-fleurs 15.9% mini, courgettes 15.9% mini, carottes 11.1% mini, haricots verts 11.1% mini, poivrons rouges 4.6% mini, poivrons jaunes 4.6% mini.
Sachet assaisonnement 0.6% (sel, épices curry (coriandre, curcuma, piment de Cayenne, cumin, fenugrec, moutarde poivre, ail, femouil, sel), piment doux, sucre, oignon, fenouil, céleri).
